reviews.text: Ich war hier soeben einen Pho für 65k Dong essen, den auf der Seite 😂 ich wurde sehr schnell und nett bedient, das Essen kam ebenfalls zügig und war sehr, sehr lecker. In der Nähe des Hafens. Sehr zu empfehlen.

Local Grab driver refers us this Pho place! It’s very local and delicious, love it! We order both raw beef pho and cooked beef pho, both are delicious but cooked beef pho is much more impressed. Give a visit if you are looking for local Pho in Da Nang.

Delicious pho

평이 좋아서 방문했다. 쌀국수 맛있다고 리뷰 남긴 사람 입맛은 제각각이지만 맛이 없는 건 아니고 기본 정도입니다. 찾아갈 정도는 아니고요. 짜죠? 맛있네요. 하지만 작은 사이즈도 양이 많고 비싸네요 쌀국수 작은 거(65000동, 짜죠 작은 거(270000동) 시켜서 335000동 나왔습니다. 이건 좀.. 짜죠 1인분 작은 걸 만들던지. 저는 메뉴 구성과 금액에 실망했습니다.
보니까 한국 관광버스 단체로 오던데 신경 좀 써주셨으면 합니다.

An Authentic Gem with Standout Pork: Quan Pho Hong

If you are hunting for an authentic local dining experience in Vietnam that balances great flavor with a welcoming atmosphere, Quan Pho Hong is a spot that absolutely deserves a visit. It captures the essence of a traditional Vietnamese eatery—bustling, unpretentious, and focused entirely on the quality of the food.

The Food and Drink While the restaurant’s name suggests a focus on noodles, and indeed the pho is tasty with a rich, aromatic broth that hits all the right notes, the menu has a hidden superstar. The crispy pork is delicious—perfectly seasoned with a satisfying crunch that complements the softer textures of the noodle soups.

True to local hospitality, the meal comes with plenty of complimentary sides. You are served free vegetables to add freshness to your bowl, and free tea is readily available to wash it all down. For those looking to unwind after a long day of sightseeing, beer is available as well, making it a great spot to relax.

Atmosphere and Service The vibe is distinctively casual and open. It is important to note that there is no air conditioning, so it can get a bit warm, but the ceiling fans and open front keep the air moving. This is very much a part of the authentic street-food style experience. Despite the lack of A/C, the environment is very family-friendly, making it a safe choice for travelers with children.

A unique and helpful touch for tourists from Thailand or those familiar with the language is that the owner speaks Thai. This makes communication significantly easier and adds a personal layer of hospitality that is hard to find elsewhere.

Getting There Logistics are straightforward, provided you plan ahead. There is no parking available at the restaurant, so driving a rental car or scooter can be a hassle. However, it’s easy to get there using Grab. I highly recommend booking a ride to drop you right at the front door to avoid the stress of finding a spot for your vehicle.

Verdict Quan Pho Hong offers a delicious, genuine meal with fantastic crispy pork and a friendly owner. Just call a Grab, dress for the warm weather, and bring your appetite!

다낭여행 4일중 젤 나은
식당. 국물이 깔끔하고
서비스로 김치도 줌.
새우튀김은 먹을만한데
8개,10개로만 판매.
두명이서 4개만 시켜서
두개씩만 먹으면 될듯
씰국수 외 다른 음식이 다 맛있어요.

It is important to note that there is no air conditioning, so it can get a bit warm, but the ceiling fans and open front keep the air moving. This is very much a part of the authentic street-food style experience. Despite the lack of A/C, the environment is very family-friendly, making it a safe choice for travelers with children.

A unique and helpful touch for tourists from Thailand or those familiar with the language is that the owner speaks Thai. This makes communication significantly easier and adds a personal layer of hospitality that is hard to find elsewhere.

Getting There Logistics are straightforward, provided you plan ahead. There is no parking available at the restaurant, so driving a rental car or scooter can be a hassle. However, it’s easy to get there using Grab. I highly recommend booking a ride to drop you right at the front door to avoid the stress of finding a spot for your vehicle.

Verdict Quan Pho Hong offers a delicious, genuine meal with fantastic crispy pork and a friendly owner. Just call a Grab, dress for the warm weather, and bring your appetite!
